title: UAE VASP License Record
description: A single record describing a licensed or regulated virtual asset entity in the UAE, as maintained by the NeosLegal UAE VASP License Tracker.

entity_name.description: Legal name of the licensed/regulated entity.

trade_name.description: Trading or brand name, if different from the legal name.

regulator.description: Regulator that issued or oversees the licence.

jurisdiction.description: UAE jurisdiction or free zone (e.g. Dubai, ADGM, DIFC, UAE federal).

license_type.description: Category or class of licence/permission held.

licensed_activities.description: Virtual asset activities the entity is permitted to perform. Multiple values may be separated by a semicolon.

license_date.description: Date the licence was issued or became effective. Preferred format is ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD where an exact date is available; a year-only value YYYY is valid where only the year is known. Month and day are never invented.

source_url.description: URL of the official regulator source for the record.

official_website.description: The entity's official website, if known.

last_checked.description: Date the record was last verified against the source (ISO 8601).
